---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature request"
about: Suggest an idea to make ScamReaper better
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Start with the *problem*, not the solution. Example: "My mom doesn't
understand what YELLOW means in the notification." -->

## Who benefits?

<!-- Grandma? Power users? Security researchers? Non-English speakers?
Be specific — features without a clear audience usually get declined. -->

## Describe the feature

<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem, and why they're worse. -->

## Privacy check

ScamReaper has three hard rules. Confirm the feature does **not** violate any:

- [ ] No network calls related to call screening
- [ ] No analytics, tracking, or ad SDKs
- [ ] No account, login, or subscription required

Features that break these rules will be closed without discussion.

## Are you willing to help build it?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, examples from other apps, links, anything else. -->
